message.content:
@startuml
autonumber
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageSize 100

actor "User" as user1
participant "server" as server
database "user" as db

activate server

user1 -> server: 1 POST /sign-up with body: email and password

activate db
server -> db: 2 Check email existence

alt [Email existed]
  db --> server: 3 Error code
  server --> user1: 4 Error message
else [Email is new]
  db --> server: 5 Email is available
  activate server
  server -> server: 6 Hash password
  deactivate server
  server -> db: 7 Store email and hashed password
  db --> server: 8 Store complete
  server --> user1: 9 Success message
end

deactivate db
deactivate server

@enduml
